steps.title: Find the equation of the line
steps.content:
The graph shows a linear relationship between temperature and pressure. The line passes through the origin and the point $(300, 6)$. The slope is $\frac{6}{300} = \frac{1}{50} = 0.02$. Therefore, the equation of the line is:
$$y = 0.02x$$

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 600 kelvins
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 600$ into the equation:
$$y = 0.02(600) = 12$$
The pressure at 600 kelvins is 12 psi. That matches choice B — B is correct.
